name: currency-exchange
title: Currency Exchange
description: Simple Currency Exchange with a selectable rate provider (ExchangeRate-API or UniRateAPI)
author: xeric

preferences.name: provider
preferences.title: Rate Provider
preferences.description: Which exchange rate API to query. Switch this if you prefer UniRateAPI's pricing or coverage.

preferences.name: api_key
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: Key for the selected provider. ExchangeRate-API: https://app.exchangerate-api.com/dashboard — UniRateAPI: https://unirateapi.com/dashboard
preferences.placeholder: API key for the selected provider
